14.reason: [The conditions (a>=0&&a<=9) and (b>=0&&b<=9) compare characters with integer literals 0 and 9 instead of character literals '0' and '9', causing incorrect type checks.]

17.reason: [Loop condition 'n>a' is always true since n starts at a+1 and increments; also, using 'n' as loop variable of type char may overflow or behave unexpectedly. Additionally, the loop does not print the full range correctly due to flawed logic.]
